description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and green lawn areas. The house features a light-colored exterior, symmetrical window placement, and a gable roof with asphalt shingles. The front entryway is marked by a small porch with steps, flanked by decorative shrubs and a tree. The rear of the house includes a patio area and what appears to be a small pool or water feature. The property is landscaped with several trees and bushes, and a car is parked in the driveway. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, with clean lines and balanced proportions.
description: A two-story light-colored house with a gable roof, detached garage, paved driveway, and landscaped yard, featuring symmetrical windows and a small front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, detached garage, driveway with a car, and prominent landscaping including a large tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the rear patio area with visible trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, patio, small pool or water feature, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the house, garage, and more of the paved and green areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and decorative shrubs
